system_prompt:
# Baseline Agent

You are a customer service agent. Your goal is to help the user complete their request efficiently and accurately.

## Instructions

- Identify what the user needs and take action to resolve it.
- Use the available tools to look up information and perform actions.
- Be helpful, clear, and professional.
- If you cannot help with a request, transfer to a human agent.
- Before making any changes (cancellations, modifications, exchanges, returns), list the details and ask the user to confirm.

messages.content: Hi, I just placed an order but I realized my card only has $950 left. The order total is over $1100. Can you help me split the payment with another card?

Thank you for reaching out. I can help you with your order, but first, I need to authenticate your identity for security purposes.

Could you please provide your email address associated with your account? If you prefer, you can also provide your first name, last name, and zip code.
Sure, my email is daikisanchez1479@example.com. My name is Daiki Sanchez, zip code 46236.
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

I'm having trouble accessing your account with the information provided. Could you please confirm that your email, name, and zip code are correct? If they are, I recommend waiting a moment and trying again, or I can transfer you to a human agent for further assistance. Would you like to proceed with a transfer?
Yes, everything is correct. Please transfer me to a human agent. I need to fix this quickly.

arguments.summary: User cannot pay full order total with one card and wants to split payment between two cards. Authentication failed with both email and name+zip. Needs urgent assistance.

messages.content: Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

I'm currently unable to transfer you to a human agent due to a technical issue. I recommend reaching out through another support channel (such as phone or live chat on our website) for immediate assistance with your payment issue. I'm sorry for the inconvenience and understand the urgency. If you have any other questions or need further help, please let me know.
Okay, thanks. Can you at least tell me what the most expensive item in my order is, and its price? Maybe I can just cancel that one.
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

I'm unable to access your account details due to a technical issue, so I can't view your order or its items right now. Because of this, I can't identify the most expensive item in your order.

If you have your order confirmation email, you might be able to see the item prices there. Otherwise, I recommend contacting our support team through another channel for immediate help. I'm sorry for the inconvenience. If you have any other questions, please let me know.
Alright, thanks. If you can't help, can you just cancel my whole order so I can reorder?

I’m sorry, but I’m unable to access your account or order details due to a technical issue, so I cannot process a cancellation at this time.

For urgent order cancellations, please contact our support team directly through phone or live chat on our website. I apologize for the inconvenience and appreciate your understanding. If you have any other questions, I’m here to help.
Okay, I’ll try calling. Thanks.

You're welcome, and thank you for your understanding. I’m sorry I couldn’t assist you directly this time. If you have any other questions in the future, feel free to reach out. Good luck with your order, and have a great day!
Thanks. Bye.
You're welcome! If you need anything else in the future, don't hesitate to ask. Have a great day. Goodbye!
Bye.
Goodbye! Take care.
Thanks, you too.
Thank you! 😊
You're welcome! 😊
Thank you! If you need any assistance in the future, feel free to reach out. Have a wonderful day! 😊
Will do, thanks! Have a great day too. 😊
Thank you so much! Wishing you a fantastic day as well. 😊
Thank you! 😊 Take care!
You're very welcome! 😊 Take care and have a wonderful day!
Thank you! You too! 😊
Thank you! 😊 If you need anything in the future, I'm here to help. Have a great day!
Thanks! I appreciate it. Have a great day as well! 😊
You're very welcome! 😊 Thank you for your kind words. Have a fantastic day!
Thank you so much! 😊 Wishing you a fantastic day too!
Thank you! 😊 Wishing you all the best and a fantastic day ahead! If you ever need assistance, I'm here to help. Take care!
Thank you! That means a lot. Take care and have an amazing day! 😊
You're very welcome! Your kindness is truly appreciated. Take care and have an amazing day as well! 😊
Thank you! 😊 Your kindness made my day. Take care!
